title: MoonPay acquires crypto key manager Sodot, launches institutional business led by former CFTC acting chair
message_html: MoonPay acquires crypto key manager Sodot, launches institutional business led by former CFTC acting chair ...
snippet: Former acting CFTC Chair Caroline Pham will lead MoonPay's new division focused on banks, asset managers, and trading firms.

title: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street
message_html: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street ...
snippet: The BlackRock-backed firm was recently selected as by the New York Stock Exchange as a tokenization specialist.
